failureDetails.error: Asset visual QA assets[] is empty.

statement: This E2E validates one bounded chunk only and does not validate full dataset completion.

args:
Use Codex internal Image Gen only for exactly one Seolleyeon AI profile asset.
Do not use OpenAI Image API. Do not use Batch API. Do not require OPENAI_API_KEY.
Do not modify CLIP/SVD/KNN/RRF recommender files or any recommender pipeline code.
Generate exactly one image, then stop. Do not continue to the next asset. Do not run QA.
Do not recover, copy, move, rename, or import generated files; the parent bounded executor owns recovery and file QA after this call.

Output geometry requirement:
- Generate a portrait image close to 2:3 aspect ratio, ideally 1024x1536.
- Do not create an ultra-tall, panoramic, square, or heavily cropped image.
- The recovered file must satisfy vertical profile file QA aspect ratio checks.

Single asset to generate:
assetId: female_997__face_card__v001
profileId: female_997
gender: female
numericId: 997
shotType: face_card
targetFaceType: deer_like
targetLooksLevelBand: 2.5-3.2
attempt: 1
promptHash: 963b790e742628329a750438
expectedRawPath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/raw/female_997__face_card__v001__attempt01.png
expectedFinalPath: C:/Users/samsung/StudioProjects/semisemifinal/ai_image/female/997/face_card.png

Generation prompt:
Generate exactly one vertical realistic smartphone profile photo.

Asset metadata:
assetId: female_997__face_card__v001
profileId: female_997
shotType: face_card

Use this prompt:
A realistic adult Korean university student, approximately 21 years old, an adult woman, natural everyday profile photo, not a celebrity, not an influencer, authentic campus-based relationship profile style, calm and trustworthy impression.

Face details:
a soft oval face, medium-large calm eyes, a delicate jawline, a gentle quiet expression, naturally rounded face shape, medium-large eyes, neutral eye tilt, naturally defined jawline, subtle cheek fullness, natural medium nose bridge, soft fuller lips, natural brows, clear natural skin texture, realistic attractive appearance, balanced facial symmetry, clear natural skin, well-kept but not influencer-like, warm sporty mood.

Hair and styling:
long, natural dark brown, soft wavy hair with light natural bangs, natural makeup, soft mature romantic everyday fashion, slim-regular fit without being tight, campus-appropriate and modest. Outfit: cream sweatshirt with a simple collar detail.

Composition:
head-and-shoulders portrait, face clearly visible, looking near the camera with a natural relaxed expression, simple warm off-white or campus-neutral background, not a studio portrait.

Lighting and camera:
soft natural daylight, realistic smartphone camera photo, 35mm equivalent lens, slight depth of field, natural skin texture, highly realistic but casual.

Avoid: childlike appearance, teenager, school uniform, idol trainee look, celebrity lookalike, influencer photoshoot, glamour studio lighting, heavy retouching, plastic skin, exaggerated beauty filter, revealing outfit, swimsuit, lingerie, nightclub, party scene, neon lighting, sexualized pose, luxury hotel background, identifiable school logo, visible real university name, text, watermark, distorted face, distorted hands, extra fingers, unrealistic body proportions.

Rules:
- one image only
- no text in image
- no watermark
- no logo
- adult Korean university student
- realistic, calm, trustworthy
- not influencer-like
- not school uniform
- not childlike

Goal:
Same person as the reference face_card.
Generate a realistic 3/4 body or full-body smartphone profile photo.
The body frame and proportions should be readable.
Campus-appropriate modest clothing.
No oversized padding.
No revealing outfit.
No school uniform.
No text, no logo, no watermark.

Use this prompt:
A realistic adult Korean university student, approximately 21 years old, an adult woman, natural everyday profile photo, not a celebrity, not an influencer, authentic campus-based relationship profile style, calm and trustworthy impression.

Body and silhouette:
height impression around 161cm, medium frame, average build with a soft natural body line, natural muscularity, medium shoulder width, straight natural waist line, narrow hip line, balanced leg proportion, balanced torso length, realistic adult head-to-body ratio, realistic adult body proportions, natural posture. Outfit shows the overall silhouette without being tight or revealing.

Styling:
neat blouse, regular-fit slacks, light cardigan, campus tote bag. soft mature romantic everyday fashion, clean and modest.

Composition:
three-quarter body or full-body photo, standing or walking naturally, body proportions readable, no oversized padding, no extreme wide-angle distortion, camera at chest height, enough space around the body.

Location:
quiet university walkway with trees and neutral campus buildings in the background, no visible school logo, no readable text.

Lighting and camera:
soft daylight, realistic smartphone profile photo, natural colors, casual but carefully composed.

Avoid: childlike appearance, teenager, school uniform, idol trainee look, celebrity lookalike, influencer photoshoot, glamour studio lighting, heavy retouching, plastic skin, exaggerated beauty filter, revealing outfit, swimsuit, lingerie, nightclub, party scene, neon lighting, sexualized pose, luxury hotel background, identifiable school logo, visible real university name, text, watermark, distorted face, distorted hands, extra fingers, unrealistic body proportions.
